$FLNC Read Taneja's quote again — it's about cells & components, i.e. upstream suppliers. "Looking for suppliers" means CATL/LG/Panasonic + Tesla's own Nevada LFP ramp. $FLNC isn't a supplier to Tesla. It's a competing integrator bidding for the same scarce cells.
